pi_items.source: task.json description and export_result.sh verification logic
task.json description and export_result.sh verification logic
Explicitly defined in task description and extracted from generated DIMAP XML during verification
Confirmed via struct unpack of generic shapefile and ESRI Shapefile specification (0x0000270A)

privileged_info_summary: The target input data is a real Landsat 7 TOA composite downloaded from the opengeos data repository (originally from Google Earth Engine's LANDSAT_LE7_TOA_5YEAR dataset). The task strictly demands applying the vegetation index formula '(band_2 - band_3) / (band_2 + band_3)', saving the intermediate SNAP project to '/home/ga/snap_projects/vegetation_analysis.dim', and exporting the final mask as an ESRI Shapefile to '/home/ga/snap_exports/dense_vegetation.shp'. Verification logic relies on parsing the DIMAP XML for the mathematical expression and directly verifying the ESRI Shapefile magic byte (9994) in the exported file.
